events.title: Vennesladagene — Town Festival Days
events.description: Vennesla's annual town festival fills the centre with market stalls, funfair rides, concerts on the main stage and activities for the whole family across the weekend.

events.title: Author Evening at Vennesla Library
events.description: A conversation with a bestselling Norwegian crime author in the award-winning Vennesla bibliotek, followed by a Q&A and book signing. Coffee and waffles served.

events.title: Otra River Paddle Day
events.description: Guided canoe and kayak trips on the Otra river for beginners and families. Equipment, life vests and instruction included; meet at the boathouse by Vigeland bridge.

events.title: Steam Train Sunday on the Setesdal Line
events.description: Heritage steam train departures on the historic Setesdalsbanen from Grovane station. Ride a 1894 steam locomotive through the Otra valley — a favourite for families and rail enthusiasts.

events.title: Sankthans Midsummer Bonfire
events.description: Traditional Norwegian midsummer celebration by the Otra with a large bonfire, grilling, live folk music and games for children. Bring your own picnic or buy from local stalls.

events.title: Vindbjart Summer Youth Football Cup
events.description: Youth football tournament hosted by FK Vindbjart with teams from across Agder. Matches all weekend at Moseidmoen, kiosk and grill open both days.

events.title: Vennesla Farmers & Crafts Market
events.description: Monthly market with local farm produce, baked goods, handicrafts and flowers in the town square outside the Kulturhus.

events.title: Summer Concert in Kulturhuset
events.description: An evening of Norwegian pop and folk in the Vennesla Kulturhus concert hall, featuring regional artists and the local choir as special guests.
